name: Gradient Callout CTA Section
best_for: Full-width banner with a headline and a single button centered on the branded orange/yellow gradient image.
notes: Background Gradient_callout.png (cover/no-repeat/center) with Sunshine #faa31b fallback; padding 48px 25px 56px 25px; headline Brand Blue Nunito Sans 800 ~28px centered top third; button Deep Blue fill, white 800 18px label, Gold #FFC20E arrow, 248x64px, mandatory radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px.
